message:
feat(cli): Wire Output abstraction to all command functions

Complete the foundational step of passing Output to all CLI commands:
- Updated all cmd_* function signatures to accept &Output parameter
- Updated all call sites in main() to pass &output
- cmd_import passes output through to cmd_index for consistent output

This establishes the foundation for replacing println! calls with
output.print() calls throughout the CLI for proper TTY detection,
styled output, and graceful degradation for piped output.

Part of bd-33n: Final integration - Wire rich_rust output throughout CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
